responseMessageContents.text:
Done. End-to-end verification complete with real evidence — no fabrication.

```
TASK_ID: ivx-previous-task-deploy-live-verify-2026-07-05T14:16Z
PREVIOUS_TASK: IVX super speed (commit 227a5bb3)
GITHUB_TOKEN_RUNTIME_VISIBLE: yes (verified against GitHub API as ibb142 — new PAT works)
GITHUB_REPO_URL_RUNTIME_VISIBLE: confirmed via Render connectedRepo
RENDER_API_KEY_RUNTIME_VISIBLE: valid — authenticated (live backend)
RENDER_SERVICE_ID_RUNTIME_VISIBLE: valid — suffix ...ftose0
GITHUB_PUSH_RESULT: NO PUSH NEEDED — 227a5bb3 already HEAD of github/main
GITHUB_SHA: 227a5bb376b42157f86b0346c5d4f937a64878e2
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID: dep-d94tfkkvikkc73cvkh90 (status: live)
HEALTH_RESPONSE: 200 — healthy, commit 227a5bb3
VERSION_RESPONSE: 200 — production, commit 227a5bb3
COMMIT_MATCH: ALL FOUR MATCH (github HEAD = render live = /health = /version)
LIVE_OWNER_CHAT_TEST: endpoint live, returned 401 (correct auth-guard behavior — no bearer in probe)
PROOF_LEDGER_ENTRY: logs/audit/deploy-proof/2026-07-05T141635Z-live-verify-227a5bb3/proof.json

FINAL_STATUS: PREVIOUS_TASK_DEPLOYED_AND_VERIFIED_LIVE
```

**What this means:** Your previous task is already live in production. Commit `227a5bb3` is the HEAD on GitHub, the live Render deploy, and the running backend — all four SHA references match exactly.

**Three housekeeping items remain (none block the live deploy):**
1. The live Security Box credential store still has your **old** GitHub token (returning 401). To update it with the new PAT, save it via the IVX app's Security Box screen (it requires your owner session — I can't write to the live owner_variables store from here).
2. `GITHUB_REPO_URL` is missing from owner_variables — add `https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` via the same Security Box save flow.
3. **Critical security:** Revoke the token you pasted in chat at https://github.com/settings/tokens now that verification is done, and generate a fresh one to save in the Security Box.

Want me to walk you through the in-app save flow to get the Security Box showing all green?
